title: The structured token editor is now a valid primitive world model
decision: Select fixed mixed token-aligned EMA as the primitive; scale exposure and width, reject K>1, and repair K=1 recursive tradeoff before GAR and hierarchy.
plain_summary: Forty jobs established causal operation, pointer, and content use. Exposure and width improve prediction; effects replicate across seeds. One counterfactual saturates but slightly harms recursive rollout.
